definition: To love, to be fond of, to love dearly. Used of the highest kind of love, divine love. This is the supreme Greek word for love, expressing the most noble form of affection.
searchText: ἀγαπάω agapaō to love to love, to be fond of, to love dearly. used of the highest kind of love, divine love. this is the supreme greek word for love, expressing the most noble form of affection. love beloved loves g25

definition: God. The divine being, the supreme ruler and creator of all things. In the NT, this refers specifically to the God of Israel and the Father of Jesus Christ.
searchText: θεός theos god god. the divine being, the supreme ruler and creator of all things. in the nt, this refers specifically to the god of israel and the father of jesus christ. god god god's g2316

definition: To believe, to trust, to have confidence in. Often followed by εἰς (into) with accusative. In the NT, it frequently means to trust in Christ for salvation.
searchText: πιστεύω pisteuō to believe, trust to believe, to trust, to have confidence in. often followed by εἰς (into) with accusative. in the nt, it frequently means to trust in christ for salvation. believe trust commit have faith g4100
